targets.rawSql: SELECT source_ip, sum(blocked_count) as blocked_count, sum(total_requests) as total_requests FROM security.hourly_top_ips WHERE ts_hour >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY source_ip ORDER BY blocked_count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT country_code, sum(blocked_count) as blocked FROM security.hourly_stats_by_threat WHERE ts_hour >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND country_code != "" GROUP BY country_code ORDER BY blocked DESC LIMIT 15
